name: Quick Bread Cinnamon Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pan by greasing with butter, margarine, or solid shortening.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, salt, cinnamon, and baking powder.
3. In a different bowl, blend milk, egg beaters, sugar, chocolate chips, and melted butter.
4. Add the flour mixture all at once and mix only until the flour is moist. The mixture will be lumpy.
5. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan.
6. If using a bread pan - bake for 50 to 70 minutes at 350°F or until a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out clean.
7. If using muffin cups - bake at 400°F for 20 minutes. Remove from the pan immediately and cool on a wire rack.
Note: If using a bread or loaf pan, line the pan with aluminum foil to make removing the bread easier. Makes 12 servings. Each serving contains approximately 18 calories, 9g fat (37% of calories from fat), 4g protein, 30 carbs, 215mg sodium, and 30mg cholesterol (if using real eggs) or 5mg cholesterol (if using egg beaters).
